mapper.select:
SELECT f.*, p.project_name, p.audited_unit FROM forensic_draft f LEFT JOIN audit_project p ON p.id = f.project_id
AND f.project_id = #{projectId} AND f.review_status = #{reviewStatus} AND f.issue ILIKE '%' || #{issue} || '%'
ORDER BY f.create_time DESC
SELECT f.*, p.project_name, p.audited_unit FROM forensic_draft f LEFT JOIN audit_project p ON p.id = f.project_id WHERE f.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forensic_draft(project_id, issue, basis_ids, suggestion, review_status, review_log, create_by, create_time) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{issue}, #{basisIds}, #{suggestion}, 0, '', #{createBy}, now())
mapper.update: UPDATE forensic_draft SET project_id=#{projectId}, issue=#{issue}, basis_ids=#{basisIds}, suggestion=#{suggestion}, review_status=#{reviewStatus}, review_log=#{reviewLog}, update_time=now() WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM forensic_draft WHERE id IN #{id}
